history.text: ... Friday 24 April 6 people, Joey Starr
Thank you for your interest in Opéra Taipei. For reservations for 6 people on Friday, April 24th, please tap the "Reservations" button in the menu.
Friday in 2 weeks
Opéra Taipei will be open on Friday, May 1st. We will be open from 6:00 PM until 3:00 AM.
